UIA Gold Medal & Triennial Prizes
UIA GOLD MEDAL & TRIENNIAL PRIZES

The UIA Gold Medal and Prizes are awarded on a triennial basis to recognise achievements of international consequence. The only lifetime achievement awards bestowed upon architects by their peers, they are traditionally attributed on stage at an awards ceremony at the end of the UIA Triennial World Congress. THE UIA

The UIA was founded on 28 June 1948 in Lausanne, Switzerland, following the merger of the Comité permanent international des Architectes and the Réunion International des Architectes. Its headquarters is located in Paris. The organisation is recognised as the only global architecture organisation by most United Nations agencies, including UNESCO, UN-Habitat, World Health Organization, ECOSOC, UNIDO and WTO.
